reference: Hello Doctor, I have always tried to control my anger since my childhood, but for the past three years, I usually lose my temper, and day by day, my anger is increasing significantly. I have tried all methods to control my anger, but they do not work. Is there any treatment to control anger?
text: Hello doctor, I have always tried to control my anger since my childhood. But for the past three years I usually lose my temper and day by day my anger is increasing significantly. I have tried all methods to control my anger but they do not work. Is there any treatment to control anger?
